parameters.jsCode:
const item = $json;
const recommendedTitle = item.job_title_ranking?.categorized_under || item.job_title;
const report = {
  run_id: item.run_id,
  batch_run_id: item.batch_run_id || null,
  generated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
  candidate: {
    name: item.candidate_name || item.structured_resume?.candidate_name || 'Unknown',
    email: item.candidate_email || item.structured_resume?.candidate_email || null,
  },
  recommended_job_title: recommendedTitle,
  job_title_ranking: item.job_title_ranking || null,
  job: {
    title: item.job_title,
    source: item.matched_against || 'best_job_title',
    resume_job_title: item.resume_job_title || item.job_title,
    all_titles_on_resume: item.resume_all_job_titles || [],
    title_alignment: item.ai_analysis?.title_alignment || {},
    min_experience_years: item.min_experience_years,
    required_skills: item.required_skills || [],
    preferred_skills: item.preferred_skills || [],
  },
  ats_score: item.ats_result || {},
  skill_extraction: item.skill_extraction || {},
  experience_analysis: item.experience_result || {},
  job_match: item.job_match || {},
  recommendation: item.recommendation || {},
  ai_summary: item.ai_analysis?.report_summary || '',
};

const rankingLine = item.job_title_ranking?.best_match
  ? `Recommended Job Title: ${item.job_title_ranking.best_match.title} (score ${item.job_title_ranking.best_match.match_score})`
  : `Job Title: ${report.job.title}`;

const text = [
  'Resume Analysis Report',
  `Candidate: ${report.candidate.name}`,
  rankingLine,
  `Categorized Under: ${recommendedTitle}`,
  `ATS Score: ${report.ats_score.score ?? 'n/a'}`,
  `Weighted Match Score: ${report.job_match.weighted_match_score ?? 'n/a'}`,
  `Recommendation: ${report.recommendation.label || 'n/a'}`,
  `Reasoning: ${item.job_title_ranking?.best_match?.reasoning || report.recommendation.reason || 'n/a'}`,
  `Summary: ${report.ai_summary || 'n/a'}`,
].join('\n');

return { json: { ...item, report, report_text: text } };

parameters.content:
## Resume Analysis Agent

• Multiple resumes: resumes, resume_file_paths, or scan_resumes_folder
• Multiple roles: job_titles array
• AI ranks best role per candidate
• Notifications: Telegram + Email (env: OPENROUTER_API_KEY, TELEGRAM_*, SMTP)

parameters.jsCode: return { json: $('Prepare Resume File').item.json };
